title: Stock futures tick higher after Trump says Iran war ‘should be ending pretty soon’: Live updates
summary: President Trump confirmed that Israeli and Lebanese leaders agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following Washington meetings. The potential de-escalation could ease geopolitical uncertainty affecting global markets.
content: President Donald Trump confirmed on Thursday that the leaders of Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire after officials met in Washington.

zh.title: 特朗普称伊朗战争"应该很快就会结束"后股指期货走高：实时更新
zh.summary: 特朗普总统确认以色列和黎巴嫩领导人在华盛顿会议后同意了为期10天的停火协议。这一潜在的降级可能会缓解影响全球市场的地缘政治不确定性。

title: Think the rally is safe? This elite market-timing indicator says a correction is overdue.
summary: The gold-platinum ratio, a technical market indicator, suggests stocks may be overvalued and due for a correction. Investors should exercise caution despite current market strength.
content: The gold-platinum ratio suggests the stock market is living on borrowed time.

zh.title: 认为反弹是安全的吗？这个精英市场择时指标显示调整已经过期
zh.summary: 黄金白金比率作为一个技术市场指标，表明股票可能被高估，并且需要进行调整。尽管目前市场强劲，投资者仍应谨慎行事。

title: Apple's iPhone shipments in China surge 20% in first quarter, data shows
summary: Apple's iPhone shipments in China grew 20% in Q1, the strongest growth rate among major vendors according to Counterpoint Research. The surge demonstrates Apple's competitive strength in the critical Chinese market.
content: Apple's iPhone shipments surged 20% in China in the first quarter, for the strongest growth among ⁠major vendors, data from Counterpoint Research ​showed.

zh.title: 数据显示苹果公司iPhone在中国的出货量在第一季度激增20%
zh.summary: 根据Counterpoint Research，苹果公司iPhone在中国的出货量在第一季度增长了20%，是主要厂商中增长率最高的。这一激增展示了苹果公司在关键中国市场中的竞争力。

title: Signs point to a solid earnings season — and with the S&P 500 topping 7,000, you should believe them
summary: Corporate executives are broadcasting bullish earnings outlooks, providing confidence as the S&P 500 surpasses 7,000. Economic fundamentals appear solid despite ongoing geopolitical tensions.
content: Corporate executives with a front-row seat on the economy are broadcasting a bullish message and drowning out Iran war noise.

zh.title: 迹象指向扎实的财报季 — 随着标普500指数突破7000点，你应该相信这一点
zh.summary: 公司高管们传达看涨的财报前景，在标普500指数突破7000点时提供信心。尽管地缘政治紧张局势持续，经济基本面看起来仍然稳健。

title: The world’s most stable asset is losing its grip — leaving your paycheck and retirement vulnerable to inflation
summary: Treasury bonds are no longer providing reliable protection against inflation, threatening purchasing power for workers and retirees. This shift in traditional safe-haven assets creates new financial vulnerabilities.
content: Treasury bonds are no longer guaranteed safe havens — and your spending power is on the line.

zh.title: 世界上最稳定的资产正在失去控制力 — 使你的薪资和退休金易受通胀影响
zh.summary: 美国国债不再提供可靠的通胀防护，威胁工人和退休人员的购买力。传统避险资产这种转变造成了新的金融脆弱性。

title: South Korean stocks remain ‘undervalued’, says Goldman after huge rebound from March losses
summary: Goldman Sachs believes South Korean stocks remain undervalued after their recent rebound from March losses. The firm cites incremental improvements in corporate governance reforms as a positive catalyst.
content: Goldman Sachs wrote that South Korea's reforms to corporate governance are improving "incrementally".

zh.title: 高盛表示韩国股票在3月亏损后大幅反弹后仍然"被低估"
zh.summary: 高盛认为韩国股票在最近从3月亏损中反弹后仍然被低估。该公司指出公司治理改革的增量改进是积极催化剂。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Netflix, Oracle, Affirm and more
summary: Major stocks including Netflix, Oracle, and Affirm are posting significant premarket moves. These trading signals suggest notable activity ahead of market open.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 股票盘前最大涨跌：Netflix、Oracle、Affirm等
zh.summary: Netflix、Oracle和Affirm等主要股票在盘前出现大幅波动。这些交易信号表明市场开盘前可能会有显著活动。

title: UK petrol and diesel prices fall after weeks of rises
summary: UK fuel prices have declined after weeks of increases driven by the US-Israeli conflict with Iran raising wholesale costs. The price relief reflects some stabilization in geopolitical tensions.
content: Drivers have seen weeks of increases as the US-Israeli war with Iran pushed up wholesale oil prices.

zh.title: 英国汽油和柴油价格在上涨数周后下跌
zh.summary: 英国燃油价格在上涨数周后下降，之前的上涨是由美以冲突与伊朗引发的批发成本上升所驱动。价格下跌反映了地缘政治紧张局势的某种程度的缓解。

title: Netflix is lower after latest earnings report. Many analysts say buy the dip — here's why
summary: Netflix stock fell following its latest earnings report, but analysts remain bullish and recommend buying the dip. Their continued confidence signals faith in the platform's long-term prospects.
content: Analysts are largely sticking by Netflix, telling clients to buy the dip after after the streaming platform's latest results sent the stock lower.

zh.title: Netflix在最新财报后下跌。许多分析师建议逢低买入——原因如下
zh.summary: Netflix在发布最新财报后股价下跌，但分析师仍然看好该股并建议逢低买入。他们持续的信心表明对该平台长期前景的信心。

title: Nvidia AI chip rivals attract record funding as competition heats up
summary: Startups are raising record funding to develop AI chips challenging Nvidia's market dominance. This influx of capital signals growing investor confidence in competitive alternatives.
content: A growing crop of startups are set on challenging the chip giant's supremacy.

zh.title: Nvidia AI芯片竞争对手吸引创纪录融资，竞争加剧
zh.summary: 初创公司筹集创纪录资金开发AI芯片以挑战Nvidia的市场主导地位。这种资本涌入表明投资者对竞争性替代品的信心不断增长。

title: U.S. tech companies ramp up government lobbying amid Iran war uncertainty
summary: U.S. tech companies are escalating government lobbying efforts to mitigate disruptions from the Iran conflict. The White House is actively coordinating with industry leaders to minimize economic impact.
content: A White House spokesperson told CNBC the administration had been working with industry leaders to mitigate disruption brought about by the conflict.

zh.title: 美国科技公司在伊朗战争不确定性中加强政府游说
zh.summary: 美国科技公司正在加强政府游说力度，以缓解伊朗冲突造成的中断。白宫正在积极与行业领导者协调，以最大程度降低经济影响。

title: Uber Eats has a fix for pesky returns. You can just sit on the couch
summary: Uber Eats launched a return pickup feature allowing customers to return items from retailers like Best Buy and Dick's Sporting Goods without leaving home. This convenience enhancement strengthens the platform's appeal for online shopping.
content: The Uber Eats return pickup feature applies to items bought through the app from Best Buy, Dick's Sporting Goods, Petco and more.

zh.title: Uber Eats解决烦人的退货问题。你可以坐在沙发上
zh.summary: Uber Eats推出了退货上门服务功能，允许客户从Best Buy和Dick's Sporting Goods等零售商退货而无需离家。这项便利功能增强了该平台对在线购物的吸引力。

title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
summary: Newer ETF strategies may be particularly vulnerable during extreme market volatility and downturns. Investors should carefully evaluate the risks of innovative exchange-traded fund approaches.
content: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.

zh.title: 如果市场遭遇剧烈下跌，新型ETF策略可能会很脆弱。原因在这里
zh.summary: 较新的ETF策略在极端市场波动和下跌期间可能特别容易受损。投资者应仔细评估创新交易所交易基金方法的风险。

title: These two sectors have been boosted by AI hopes. Why investors should buy one, and trim exposure to the other.
summary: The technology sector, which has surged on AI optimism, has further upside according to Ned Davis Research. While tech offers opportunity, investors should consider trimming exposure to other AI-benefiting sectors.
content: Technology has lifted the market higher and has further to go, says Ned Davis Research

zh.title: 这两个行业因AI希望而获得提振。为什么投资者应该买入一个，削减另一个的敞口
zh.summary: 根据Ned Davis Research，因AI乐观而飙升的科技行业有进一步上升空间。虽然科技提供机会，但投资者应考虑削减对其他AI受益行业的敞口。

title: Some grocers are using AI to cut food waste and boost profit margins
summary: Supermarkets are deploying AI-powered dynamic pricing to reduce food waste, protect profit margins, and compete for price-conscious shoppers. The technology optimizes inventory while maintaining profitability.
content: Grocers turn to AI pricing to cut waste, protect margins and compete for deal-seeking shoppers—targeting dynamic pricing discounts.

zh.title: 一些杂货店正在使用AI来减少食品浪费和提高利润率
zh.summary: 超市正在部署AI驱动的动态定价，以减少食品浪费、保护利润率并与注重价格的购物者竞争。该技术优化库存的同时保持盈利能力。

title: Chinese carmaker patents voice-controlled 'in-vehicle toilet'
summary: Chinese automaker Seres patents a voice-controlled in-vehicle toilet as carmakers accelerate innovation to compete in the fiercely contested electric vehicle market.
content: Seres' plans show how stiff competition in the EV space is putting pressure on carmakers to innovate.

zh.title: 中国汽车制造商申请语音控制"车内厕所"专利
zh.summary: 中国汽车制造商赛力斯为语音控制的车内厕所申请专利，随着汽车制造商加速创新以在竞争激烈的电动汽车市场中竞争。

title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
summary: Finance officials and bankers express concern that the Mythos AI model poses unprecedented cybersecurity risks due to its ability to identify and exploit system vulnerabilities.
content: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.

zh.title: 财政部长和顶级银行家对Mythos AI模型提出严重关切
zh.summary: 金融官员和银行家表示担忧，Mythos AI模型因其识别和利用系统漏洞的能力而带来前所未有的网络安全风险。

title: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes
summary: Oil prices fell after Trump signaled support for ending the Iran war and following a 10-day ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon.
content: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington.

zh.title: 特朗普重申伊朗战争"应该"尽快结束，以色列-黎巴嫩停火协议提振希望，油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普表示支持结束伊朗战争，以色列和黎巴嫩达成10天停火协议后，油价下跌。

title: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson warns U.S. needs an emergency ‘break-the-glass’ plan if Treasury demand collapses
summary: Former Treasury Secretary Paulson urges policymakers to develop contingency plans for a potential Treasury market crisis that could trigger severe economic consequences.
content: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson on Thursday urged U.S. policymakers to prepare an emergency plan in case demand for Treasurys breaks down — warning that a crisis in the government bond market could trigger severe consequences across the economy.

zh.title: 前财政部长保尔森警告美国需要应对国债需求崩溃的紧急"破玻璃"计划
zh.summary: 前财政部长保尔森敦促政策制定者制定应急预案，应对可能引发严重经济后果的国债市场危机。

title: Asia markets mostly fall as fragile Middle East ceasefire tempers sentiment
summary: Asia-Pacific markets declined as the fragile Israel-Lebanon ceasefire dampened investor risk appetite, though U.S. stocks set fresh records.
content: Most Asia-Pacific markets traded lower Friday as an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire tempered risk appetite, even after Wall Street closed at fresh record highs.

zh.title: 亚洲市场因脆弱的中东停火协议降温而多数下跌
zh.summary: 由于以色列-黎巴嫩脆弱停火协议削弱了投资者的风险偏好，亚太地区市场下跌，但美国股市创历史新高。

title: IMF, World Bank say they are resuming dealings with Venezuela
summary: The IMF and World Bank announced they are resuming financial dealings with Venezuela after suspending relations since 2019.
content: The International Monetary Fund and the World Bank on Thursday each said they had resumed dealings with Venezuela, which had been paused since 2019.

zh.title: 国际货币基金组织和世界银行表示正恢复与委内瑞拉的关系
zh.summary: 国际货币基金组织和世界银行宣布在暂停2019年以来的关系后，正恢复与委内瑞拉的金融往来。

title: Trump says war in Iran is going 'swimmingly' and 'should be ending pretty soon'
summary: Trump predicted the Iran war would end soon, following Israel's ceasefire announcement with Lebanon. This reflects ongoing Middle East tensions and Trump's optimistic stance on military engagement.
content: President Donald Trump's latest prediction on the end of the war against Iran came hours after Israel announced a ceasefire with Lebanon.

zh.title: 特朗普表示伊朗战争进展"顺利"且"应该很快就会结束"
zh.summary: 特朗普预测伊朗战争即将结束，这是在以色列宣布与黎巴嫩停火后提出的。这反映了中东地区持续的紧张局势和特朗普对军事行动的乐观态度。
